title: Autoregressive Process (AR(p)) Diagram
description: A visual representation of an autoregressive process showing how a current value in a time series is a linear combination of its own past values plus a stochastic shock.
relationships: X_t is calculated by summing: the constant c, the weighted sum of past values (φ_1*X_{t-1} + φ_2*X_{t-2} + ... + φ_p*X_{t-p}), and the random shock ε_t
